name: Built-in SMTP Server
description: Self-hosted SMTP server with automatic DKIM signing for professional email delivery. Zero configuration required - works out of the box.
author: Spwig

rate_limits.notes: Rate limits depend on Postfix configuration

enabled.title: Enable Built-in SMTP Server
enabled.description: Use the platform's built-in SMTP server for sending emails

dkim_selector.title: DKIM Selector
dkim_selector.description: DKIM selector for email signing (default: mail)

dns_requirements.dkim_info: DKIM keys are auto-generated during wizard setup
notes: Built-in SMTP server runs on localhost:2525 for security
Emails are relayed through Postfix MTA for delivery
DKIM keys are stored encrypted in the database
SPF record must include your server's public IP address
PTR/rDNS record should point your IP to your domain
DNS configuration is critical for deliverability
DNS propagation can take 15 minutes to 48 hours

postfix_installed.title: Postfix MTA
postfix_installed.description: Postfix must be installed and configured as a relay MTA

dkim_keys_generated.title: DKIM Keys
dkim_keys_generated.description: Generate DKIM keys for email signing

dns_configured.title: DNS Records
dns_configured.description: Configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC DNS records

pricing.cost_notes: Built-in SMTP is free. You only pay for your server infrastructure.

advantages: Full control of your email infrastructure
Privacy - emails don't go through third parties
disadvantages: No bounce tracking dashboard (manual Postfix logs)

changes: Management commands for DKIM and server
